name: Kogan.Com Ltd
analysis: KGN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.2300. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.2700, stop A$3.8412, target A$5.5564 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
